products.title: Smart Fitness Watch
products.description: Tracks heart rate, sleep cycles, workouts, and delivers notifications with up to 7 days of battery life.

products.title: Organic Cotton Hoodie
products.description: Ultra-soft premium heavyweight hoodie made from 100% certified organic cotton.

products.title: Professional Chef's Knife
products.description: 8-inch high-carbon German stainless steel blade designed for slicing, dicing, and chopping.

products.title: Waterproof Trail Backpack
products.description: 35L lightweight hiking backpack with rain cover, trekking pole attachments, and breathable mesh straps.

products.title: Matte Black Ceramic Coffee Mug
products.description: Handcrafted 12oz ceramic mug with a comfortable ergonomic handle, dishwasher and microwave safe.

products.title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker

products.title: Natural Soy Wax Candle Set
products.description: Set of three premium scented candles (Lavender, Eucalyptus, and Sandalwood) made from sustainable soy.

products.title: Adjustable Dumbbell Set
products.description: All-in-one selectorized dumbbell weights adjusting from 5 to 52.5 lbs with a simple dial turn.

products.title: Modern Abstract Canvas Art
products.description: Large, gallery-wrapped geometric abstract canvas piece to serve as a focal point for your living room.

products.title: USB-C Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
products.description: Rechargeable vertical mouse mapped to match natural hand placement, reducing wrist strain.

products.title: Stainless Steel Espresso Maker

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A portrait of the Jazz Age in all its decadence and excess, exploring themes of wealth, love, and the American Dream.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A gripping and heart-wrenching tale of innocence, honor, and racial injustice in the Deep South.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A chilling dystopian masterpiece that explores totalitarianism, surveillance, and the manipulation of truth.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones, packed with practical psychology and biology.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: The epic prelude to The Lord of the Rings, following Bilbo Baggins as he is swept into a quest to reclaim a lost kingdom.

books.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A groundbreaking narrative of humanity’s creation and evolution, exploring how biology and history have defined us.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, this epic blend of adventure, mysticism, environmentalism, and politics is a sci-fi legend.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: An enchanting mystical story about a young Andalusian shepherd boy who journeys to Egypt in search of a worldly treasure.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: An intellectual journey through the two systems that drive the way we think—fast, intuitive, and emotional vs slow, deliberative.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: An unforgettable memoir about a young girl who leaves her survivalist family in rural Idaho to pursue a PhD from Cambridge.

books.title: The Silent Patient
books.author: Alex Michaelides
books.description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman’s act of violence against her husband—and the therapist obsessed with uncovering her motive.

books.title: Neuromancer
books.author: William Gibson
books.description: The quintessential cyberpunk novel that introduced the concepts of cyberspace and the matrix matrix years ahead of its time.

books.title: Brave New World
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.description: A classic prophetic novel that paints a dark picture of a technologically advanced future society built on pleasure and consumerism.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.description: A romantic comedy dealing with the turbulence of marriage and status in 19th-century England.

books.title: Good to Great
books.author: Jim Collins
books.description: A rigorous business study detailing how ordinary companies transition to great companies and sustain that performance.

books.title: The Midnight Library
books.author: Matt Haig
books.description: Between life and death there is a library containing infinite books, each one the story of another reality you could have lived.

books.title: The Power of Now
books.author: Eckhart Tolle
books.description: A spiritual guide highlighting the immense importance of living in the present moment to discover inner peace.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: A lone astronaut must use his scientific wits to solve a galaxy-level extinction mystery before time runs out.

books.title: Quiet: The Power of Introverts
books.author: Susan Cain
books.description: Shows how dramatically we undervalue introverts and how much we lose by doing so in a culture optimized for extroverts.

books.title: The Catcher in the Rye
books.author: J.D. Salinger
books.description: The definitive classic on teenage angst, alienation, and identity, told through the voice of Holden Caulfield.
